ticket.title: OPTIONAL TOUR RATES NOT REFLECTED IN STRUCTURED FIELDS

test_cases.description: Verify structured Cost/Markup/Adult fields populate correctly after clicking 'Auto-split into separate tours' on the reference text.
test_cases.expected_result: Structured fields for all 8 tours populate with the correct values parsed from the reference text (no longer showing '—').

test_cases.description: Verify per-pax rates in the structured fields match the values listed in the free-text reference block for the same tour.
test_cases.expected_result: Structured per-pax values (2-13 pax, Solo, Child) exactly match the reference text values.

test_cases.description: Verify editing the reference text and re-running Auto-split updates the structured fields accordingly.
test_cases.expected_result: Structured fields reflect the latest edited reference text after re-running Auto-split.

test_cases.description: Verify manually editing a structured tour field does not get silently overwritten by stale reference text on next load.
test_cases.expected_result: Manual edits persist and are not overwritten unless Auto-split is explicitly re-run.

test_cases.description: Verify Child rate and per-pax data entered in Manage Optional Tours correctly reflects on the Agent-facing quotation output.
test_cases.expected_result: Agent-facing optional tour pricing matches what was configured in the structured fields.
